targets.expr: sum by (deployment, replica) (rate(ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", deployment=~"$deployment"}[$interval]))
sum(rate(ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", deployment=~"$deployment"}[$interval]))

panels.description: Number of tokens processed per second

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)
sum(rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))

panels.title: Prompt Tokens/s

panels.description: Number of tokens processed per second

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)
sum(rate(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))

panels.title: Generation Tokens/s

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    /
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

(
  histogram_quantile(
    0.5,
    sum by (le, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

(
  histogram_quantile(
    0.9,
    sum by (le, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))

)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)

* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)

max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.description: Latency from request start to first token returned (in seconds).

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    /
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
  )
  and on(WorkerId)

    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: Request Latency -- Mean

panels.description: Latency from request start to first token returned (in seconds).

targets.expr:
(
  histogram_quantile(
    0.5,
    sum by (le, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

targets.expr:
(
  histogram_quantile(
    0.9,
    sum by (le, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))

)

max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: Request Latency -- P90

panels.description: Percentage of used cache blocks by vLLM.

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (ray_vllm_kv_cache_usage_perc{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"})
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: Cache Utilization

targets.expr:
100 * ((sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_hits_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) / sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))) and on(WorkerId) (sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)

panels.description: Number of finished requests by their finish reason.

targets.expr:
sum by(finished_reason, WorkerId) (increase(ray_vllm_request_success_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: Finish Reason

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prefill_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_decode_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.description: Average NIXL KV cache transfer latency in milliseconds.

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    /
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    * 1000
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: Transfer Latency

panels.description: NIXL KV cache transfer throughput in GB/s.

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_bytes_transferred_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    /
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    / 1024 / 1024 / 1024
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: Transfer Throughput

panels.description: Number of NIXL KV cache transfers per second.

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_xfer_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: Transfer Rate

panels.description: Average time to post/initiate a NIXL transfer in milliseconds.

targets.expr:
(
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_post_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    /
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_post_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
    * 1000
  )
  and on(WorkerId)
  (
    sum by(WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_nixl_post_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval])) > 0
  )
)
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: Avg Post Time

panels.description: Number of failed NIXL KV cache transfers. Any non-zero value is concerning and indicates RDMA transfer errors.

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (increase(ray_vllm_nixl_num_failed_transfers{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: KV Transfer Failures

panels.description: Number of requests whose KV blocks expired before decode consumed them. Spikes indicate prefill is outrunning decode or the timeout is too short.

targets.expr:
sum by(WorkerId) (increase(ray_vllm_nixl_num_kv_expired_reqs_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[$interval]))
* on(WorkerId) group_left(deployment, replica)
max by(WorkerId, deployment, replica) (ray_serve_deployment_request_counter_total{ deployment=~"$deployment"} * 0 + 1)

panels.title: NIXL: KV Expired Requests

targets.expr: (sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d])))
(sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d])))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1h]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1h]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d])) / sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d]))

panels.title: Distribution of Requests Per Model Last 24 Hours

targets.expr: max_over_time(sum by (model_name) (rate(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[2m]))[24h:1m])

panels.title: Peak Tokens Per Second Per Model Last 24 Hours

targets.expr: sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d])) + sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1d]))

(sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w])) +
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))) / sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))

panels.title: Avg Total Tokens Per Request Last 7 Days

targets.expr: sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))

(sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w])) + sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w])))/ sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))

panels.title: Avg Total Tokens Per Request Per Model Last 7 Days

targets.expr: sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_prompt_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w])) / sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))
sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w])) / sum by (model_name) (delta(ray_vllm_request_success_total{WorkerId=~"$workerid"}[1w]))

panels.title: Tokens Per Request Per Model Last 7 Days

list.description: Filter queries of a specific Prometheus type.
list.name: datasource
